message:
chore(deps,config): deduplicate fsqlite crate paths and update MCP endpoint URL

Cargo.lock: Resolve all fsqlite workspace crates (ast, btree, func, mvcc,
observability, pager, parser, planner, vdbe, wal) to local path-override
versions (0.1.1) instead of duplicating between crates.io 0.1.0 and local
0.1.1. This eliminates ~10 duplicate [[package]] entries and ensures
mcp-agent-mail, fsqlite-core, and all transitive dependencies share a
single copy of each crate. Also downgrades several windows-sys references
from 0.61.2/0.60.2 to 0.59.0 to match the resolved dependency tree
(dirs-sys, errno, mio, parking_lot_core, rustix, tempfile, tokio,
windows_x86_64_msvc).

codex.mcp.json, cursor.mcp.json, gemini.mcp.json: Change the MCP
transport endpoint from /api/ to /mcp/ across all three IDE integration
config files to match the server's canonical route prefix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
